steps.code:
<?php
require_once 'wordpress/wp-load.php';
$dir = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/mu-plugins';
if ( ! is_dir( $dir ) ) {
	wp_mkdir_p( $dir );
}
$file = $dir . '/blockparty-modal-playground-svg-kses.php';
$lines = array(
	'<?php',
	'add_filter( \'wp_kses_allowed_html\', function( $tags, $context ) {',
	'	if ( \'post\' !== $context ) {',
	'		return $tags;',
	'	}',
	'	$tags[\'dialog\'] = array(',
	'		\'aria-modal\' => true,',
	'		\'class\' => true,',
	'		\'style\' => true,',
	'		\'id\' => true,',
	'		\'closedby\' => true,',
	'	);',
	'	$tags[\'svg\'] = array(',
	'		\'xmlns\' => true,',
	'		\'viewbox\' => true,',
	'		\'width\' => true,',
	'		\'height\' => true,',
	'		\'fill\' => true,',
	'		\'class\' => true,',
	'		\'aria-hidden\' => true,',
	'		\'role\' => true,',
	'		\'focusable\' => true,',
	'	);',
	'	$tags[\'path\'] = array(',
	'		\'d\' => true,',
	'		\'fill\' => true,',
	'		\'class\' => true,',
	'	);',
	'	return $tags;',
	'}, 10, 2 );',
);
file_put_contents( $file, implode( "\n", $lines ) . "\n" );
echo file_exists( $file ) ? 'mu-plugin installed' : 'mu-plugin failed';
?>

About Gutenberg

Johannes Gutenberg

"Gutenberg" redirects here. For the Bible, see Gutenberg Bible. For other uses, see Gutenberg (disambiguation).

Johannes Gensfleisch zur Laden zum Gutenberg (c. 1393–1406 – 3 February 1468) was a German inventor and craftsman who invented the movable-type printing press. Though movable type was already in use in East Asia, Gutenberg\'s invention of the printing press enabled a much faster rate of printing. The printing press later spread across the world, and led to an information revolution and the unprecedented mass-spread of literature throughout Europe. It had a profound impact on the development of the Renaissance, Reformation, and humanist movements.

Source : Wikipedia
